mapper.select:
SELECT O.ID, O.COMP_CD, O.PO_NO, O.PO_REV, O.PO_TITLE, O.VD_CD, O.VD_NM, TO_CHAR(O.PO_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_YMD, TO_CHAR(O.DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DLV_YMD, O.CURR_CD, O.SUPL_AMT, O.VAT_AMT, O.TOT_AMT, O.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, O.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(O.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM PO_ORDER O LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD = 'PO_STS' AND C.CD = O.STS AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE O.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND (O.PO_NO LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.PO_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.VD_NM LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND O.STS = #{sts}
ORDER BY O.ID DESC

SELECT O.ID, O.COMP_CD, O.PO_NO, O.PO_REV, O.PO_TITLE, O.VD_CD, O.VD_NM, O.PURC_GRP_CD, O.CHRG_USR_ID, O.OPER_ORG_CD, O.SRC_TYP, O.SRC_ID, TO_CHAR(O.PO_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_YMD, TO_CHAR(O.DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DLV_YMD, TO_CHAR(O.REQ_DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_DLV_YMD, O.DLV_PLACE, O.WH_CD, WH.CD_NM_KO AS WH_NM, O.DLV_COND, O.PAY_COND, O.PAY_TERM_CD, PTM.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_TERM_NM, O.PAY_METHOD_CD, PMM.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_METHOD_NM, O.CURR_CD, O.SUPL_AMT, O.VAT_AMT, O.TOT_AMT, O.PO_TYP, PT.CD_NM_KO AS PO_TYP_NM, O.PURC_TYP, CT.CD_NM_KO AS PURC_TYP_NM, O.PERFOR_BOND_YN AS PERFORM_BOND_YN, O.PERFOR_BOND_RATE AS PERFORM_BOND_RATE, O.MAINT_BOND_YN, O.MAINT_BOND_RATE, O.PAY_PLAN_YN, O.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, O.REMARK, O.REG_ID, TO_CHAR(O.REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM PO_ORDER O LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD = 'PO_STS' AND C.CD = O.STS AND C.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE PT ON PT.GRP_CD = 'PO_TYP' AND PT.CD = O.PO_TYP AND PT.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE CT ON CT.GRP_CD = 'PURC_TYP' AND CT.CD = O.PURC_TYP AND CT.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE PTM ON PTM.GRP_CD = 'PAY_TERM' AND PTM.CD = O.PAY_TERM_CD AND PTM.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE PMM ON PMM.GRP_CD = 'PAY_METHOD' AND PMM.CD = O.PAY_METHOD_CD AND PMM.DEL_YN = 'N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE WH ON WH.GRP_CD = 'WH' AND WH.CD = O.WH_CD AND WH.DEL_YN = 'N' WHERE O.ID = #{id} AND O.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT ID, ORDER_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, PRC, TAX_TYP, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, AMT, TO_CHAR(DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DLV_YMD, TO_CHAR(REQ_DLV_YMD, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_DLV_YMD, WH_CD, GR_QTY, REMARK FROM PO_ORDER_ITEM WHERE ORDER_ID = #{orderId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PO_ORDER (COMP_CD, PO_NO, PO_REV, PO_TITLE, VD_CD, VD_NM, PURC_GRP_CD, CHRG_USR_ID, OPER_ORG_CD, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, PO_YMD, DLV_YMD, REQ_DLV_YMD, DLV_PLACE, WH_CD, DLV_COND, PAY_COND, PAY_TERM_CD, PAY_METHOD_CD, CURR_CD, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, TOT_AMT, PO_TYP, PURC_TYP, PERFOR_BOND_YN, PERFOR_BOND_RATE, MAINT_BOND_YN, MAINT_BOND_RATE, PAY_PLAN_YN, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{poNo}, NVL(#{poRev}, 0), #{poTitle}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{purcGrpCd}, #{chrgUsrId}, #{operOrgCd}, NVL(#{srcTyp}, 'DIRECT'), #{srcId}, TO_DATE(#{poYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{dlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{reqDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{dlvPlace}, #{whCd}, #{dlvCond}, #{payCond}, #{payTermCd}, #{payMethodCd}, NVL(#{currCd}, 'KRW'), NVL(#{suplAmt}, 0), NVL(#{vatAmt}, 0), NVL(#{totAmt}, 0), NVL(#{poTyp},'STD'), NVL(#{purcTyp},'MT'), NVL(#{performBondYn},'N'), NVL(#{performBondRate},0), NVL(#{maintBondYn},'N'), NVL(#{maintBondRate},0), NVL(#{payPlanYn},'N'), NVL(#{sts}, 'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PO_ORDER SET PO_TITLE = #{poTitle}, VD_CD = #{vdCd}, VD_NM = #{vdNm}, PURC_GRP_CD = #{purcGrpCd}, OPER_ORG_CD = #{operOrgCd}, PO_YMD = TO_DATE(#{poYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DLV_YMD = TO_DATE(#{dlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), REQ_DLV_YMD = TO_DATE(#{reqDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DLV_PLACE = #{dlvPlace}, WH_CD = #{whCd}, DLV_COND = #{dlvCond}, PAY_COND = #{payCond}, PAY_TERM_CD = #{payTermCd}, PAY_METHOD_CD = #{payMethodCd}, CURR_CD = #{currCd}, SUPL_AMT = #{suplAmt}, VAT_AMT = #{vatAmt}, TOT_AMT = #{totAmt}, PO_TYP = NVL(#{poTyp},'STD'), PURC_TYP = NVL(#{purcTyp},'MT'), PERFOR_BOND_YN = NVL(#{performBondYn},'N'), PERFOR_BOND_RATE = NVL(#{performBondRate},0), MAINT_BOND_YN = NVL(#{maintBondYn},'N'), MAINT_BOND_RATE = NVL(#{maintBondRate},0), PAY_PLAN_YN = NVL(#{payPlanYn},'N'), REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PO_ORDER SET STS = #{sts}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE PO_ORDER SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PO_ORDER_ITEM (ORDER_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, PRC, TAX_TYP, SUPL_AMT, VAT_AMT, AMT, DLV_YMD, REQ_DLV_YMD, WH_CD, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lineNo}, #{prItemId}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty}, 0), NVL(#{prc}, 0), NVL(#{taxTyp},'TAX'), NVL(#{suplAmt}, 0), NVL(#{vatAmt}, 0), NVL(#{amt}, 0), TO_DATE(#{dlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{reqDlvYmd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{whCd}, #{remark}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT P.ID, P.ORDER_ID, P.LINE_NO, P.PAY_TYP, C.CD_NM_KO AS PAY_TYP_NM, P.PAY_NM, P.RATE, P.AMT, TO_CHAR(P.PLAN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PLAN_YMD, P.PAID_YN, P.REMARK FROM PO_PAY_PLAN P LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='PO_PAY_TYP' AND C.CD=P.PAY_TYP AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE P.ORDER_ID=#{orderId} ORDER BY P.LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PO_PAY_PLAN (ORDER_ID, LINE_NO, PAY_TYP, PAY_NM, RATE, AMT, PLAN_YMD, PAID_YN, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{lineNo}, #{payTyp}, #{payNm}, NVL(#{rate},0), NVL(#{amt},0), TO_DATE(#{planYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{paidYn},'N'), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, ORDER_ID, PO_ITEM_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, PLAN_QTY, TO_CHAR(PLAN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PLAN_YMD, DLV_PLACE, STS, REMARK FROM PO_DLV_SCHEDULE WHERE ORDER_ID=#{orderId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PO_DLV_SCHEDULE (ORDER_ID, PO_ITEM_ID, LINE_NO, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, PLAN_QTY, PLAN_YMD, DLV_PLACE, STS, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{poItemId}, #{lineNo}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, NVL(#{planQty},0), TO_DATE(#{planYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{dlvPlace}, NVL(#{sts},'PLAN'), #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(CREDIT_LIMIT,0) FROM VD_VENDOR WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
